title: OpticalConstructorProject
description: Canonical, hand/LLM-editable project envelope for the Berreman Optical Constructor (Spec 0022, Part I). This slice (003) authors the top-level envelope and the storage-owned $defs (materialEntry, sourceSpec, unitOfMeasure, project root). The physics-shaped $defs (opticalSystem, layer, opticalProperties, beamNode, beamBranch, constructorElement) are reserved anchors filled by Parts B-G and are intentionally permissive here.

schemaVersion.description: The single shipped schema version. A differing value is a validation error, not a migration trigger (Part I, out-of-scope migration).

beamTree.description: The beam-tree orchestration aggregate, rooted at a single beamNode (Part A, A.4).

systems.description: Per-element optical stacks reused as-is from the engine.

items.description: A derived/bulk artefact reference. MUST be a relative path ending in .binz so a moved project folder keeps its sidecars (Part I, I.4).

sidecars.description: Optional references to derived/bulk .binz sidecars by relative path only.

unitOfMeasure.description: Boundary unit-of-measure vocabulary (Part D, D.1). A display/IO label only; the stored magnitude is always canonical SI.

materialEntry.description: Reserved storage-owned anchor for a material-library entry; the dispersion sub-object is filled by slice 004.

sourceSpec.description: Reserved storage-owned anchor for a source specification; filled by slice 007.
